data.description: December consumer sentiment index rose to 7-month high due to improved economic conditions & growing concerns over inflation, leading to increased purchases.

data.title: Chipmaker Taiwan Semiconductor Should See Business Grow 20% Fueled By AI Demand: Analyst
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co (NYSE: TSM) is expected to drive growth in the TAIEX index by 20% due to demand for AI applications and positive corporate earnings. Expansion plans may reduce dependence on China.
